entries.description:
Use OpenClaw Safely Using Hostinger 👉 https://youricreates.com/clawdbot

In this video, I break down how to set up OpenClaw as a secure autonomous agent that runs on a VPS, connects to your apps, and handles tasks in the background. Most people misuse it by skipping isolation, permissions, and structure, which makes it unreliable or unsafe. Once you understand the system, it becomes a controlled workflow that runs consistently without manual input.

for inquiries: yvh (at) youripartnerships.com

entries.description:
Your OpenClaw summarizes conversations when the context window fills up, but that summarization crushes the details. The longer you talk, the more it forgets. Pete Steinberger recommended a plugin called LCM (Lossless Context Management) that replaces flat compaction with layered summaries where nothing is ever lost. The install is one line.

I walked through how it works, set it up live, and then combined it with Telegram topics for per-project sessions. The cross-reference capability is wild; you can pull context from any previous conversation into whatever topic you're working in right now using lcm_grep across all sessions.

LEARN OPENCLAW
I'm hosting an exclusive in-person OpenClaw Bootcamp with Alex Finn.
Small group. Hands-on. Everything from setup to advanced workflows.
Seats are extremely limited.

Join the waitlist: https://startmy.ai

Join our Discord: https://rfer.me/discord


GET THE TOOLS
OpenClaw: https://openclaw.ai
Lossless Claw Plugin: https://github.com/Martian-Engineering/lossless-claw


Key moments
00:00 The AI Memory Problem
00:32 Context Window and Token Limits
01:13 Layered Summaries Solution
02:06 Lossless Claw Plugin Installation
02:35 LCM with Telegram Topics
03:26 Cross-Session Search Example
04:05 Plugin Configuration Options
04:30 OpenClaw Chrome Integration
05:09 Live AI Browser Control Demo
05:58 One-Line Install Recap


CONNECT WITH RAY
X (Twitter): https://x.com/RayFernando1337

Full Livestream: https://www.youtube.com/live/_aXfcVO6Pbs?si=rdXgT-xMmcUWOUnt

#OpenClaw #LCM #LosslessClaw #AIAgent #ContextWindow #AIMemory #AICoding #Programming #AITools #OpenClawPlugins
